allow: PowerShell(Get-MpComputerStatus | Select-Object SmartAppControlState, SmartAppControlExpiration 2>&1; \(Get-CimInstance -Namespace root/Microsoft/Windows/CI -ClassName CITestedPolicy -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) 2>&1 | Out-Null; Get-ItemProperty -Path "HKLM:\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Control\\CI\\Policy" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object VerifiedAndReputablePolicyState)
